text.title: Staging Smoke Checklist by Surface Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: SaaS web + API + webhook smoke
example.note: 3 surfaces (Login, Create order API, Payment webhook) with 2-3 click-expect items each; sign-off RM 2026-05-20T14:12:00Z build:a3f9c1d. Deploy script greps for /^Signed: /m and refuses to promote without it.

example.title: 5 goals + no sign-off
example.note: Five vague items (Login should work, Make sure payments work). No sign-off. Decision tree caught: top-3-cap then click-expect-format then sign-off-line.
